name: Barn Hill

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2008/4321
timeline.detail: Barn Hill Wind Farm — Not Controlled Action

ownership_history.note: AGL has owned the project since 2009 — held through SPV 'Barn Hill Wind Farm Pty Ltd'

sources.title: User correction — Barn Hill Wind Farm owned by AGL Energy since 2009 (300 MW SA)
AEMO Generation Information Jan 2026 (superseded on capacity — 186 MW figure updated to 300 MW per user correction)

operational_notes: AGL has owned Barn Hill Wind Farm since 2009. Co-located with AGL's Barn Hill BESS (270 MW, planning submitted) — potential integrated wind+BESS T9 pitch with AGL retail offtake path-to-market. AURES record previously showed 'Barn Hill Wind Farm Pty Ltd' as SPV owner without upstream AGL attribution — corrected 2026-07-16 per user (Travis Hughes).
